title: Artistic Fashionistax New Thermal Super Soft Velvet Faux Fur Mink Throw Blanket Soft Warm Thick Bed Sofa Cover Single Double King (King - 200x240cm, Black)
features: Luxuriously Soft & Thick Made from High Quality Polyester Suitable For Beds / Sofas / Anywhere in Home Dust Absorbent Beautifully crafted and stitched - Ideal as a seater sofa throw / bed blanket / bed runner/ bedspread
Washing instructions: Machine washable at 30°C - Do Not Tumble Dry
Sizes: Single 127cm x 152cm - Double 150cm x 200cm - King 200cm x 240cm
Colours: Aubergine - Black - Blue - Biscuit - Burgundy - Blush Pink - Charcoal - Cream - Chocolate - Duck egg - Fuchsia - Mink - Green - Ochre - Yellow - Red - Silver - Teal
description: Ideal as seater sofa throw, bed blanket, bed runner or as a bedspread, this soft and furry faux fur throw can be the perfect accessory for any room in your home. Available in many colours to fit the ambient of your bedroom, this throw can fit a standard Single, Double, King or Super King size bed. The material is 100% polyester and is machine washable at 30°C.
